history.content:
<thought>I am facing right, but the cell directly ahead is lava. To reach the goal at the bottom right, I should navigate down the leftmost column, which appears clear. I need to turn right to face down.</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>I am facing down, and the cell below is empty. I should move forward to progress towards the goal.</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>I am now in the left column, facing down. The cell below is clear. I can continue moving down to reach the bottom row, where I will turn right to reach the goal.</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down, and the cell below me is an empty floor, so I can safely move forward to continue along the left pathway toward the bottom row.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down, and the cells below are clear floor. I will continue moving down to reach the bottom row, where I can then turn right toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at the row with the "v" (row 6 in the display) facing down. The cell below me is an empty floor, so I can safely move forward to reach the bottom row.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column 1, facing down. The cell directly below is empty floor, so moving forward is safe and brings me to the bottom row. From there I can turn left to face right and move toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 7, column 1, facing down (`v`). The cell directly below is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal at (7,7) to the right, I need to change orientation to face right. Turning left from down will face me right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right (`>`) and the path to the goal is clear, all empty floor cells. I can move forward safely toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at (7,2) facing right. The path ahead is clear with empty floor, and the goal is five cells away. I will continue moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 7, column 3, facing right. The goal is at column 7, four cells ahead with all empty floor. I will move forward again.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 7, column 4, facing right. The goal is three cells ahead at column 7. The path is clear, so I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 7, column 5, facing right. The goal is two cells ahead at column 7, with an empty cell at column 6. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 7, column 6, facing right. The goal is directly ahead at column 7. I will move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
